titleStmt.title: SII 19.29: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao, Dines Chandra Sircar and G.S. Gai
No. 29. (A.R. No. 144 of 1928.) TIRUPPAḺANAM, TANJAVUR TALUK, TANJAVUR DISTRICT. ON THE NORTH WALL OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE, ĀPATSAHĀYĒŚVARA TEMPLE.

summary.p: This is very probably an inscription of Rājēndra-Chōḷa I. It is damaged in places. It records an endowment of 5 pieces of land at Pēraṅgālakkuḍi after purchase (from the temple) and reclamation for feeding 4 Brāhmaṇas in the temple of Tiruppaḻanam in Miṟai-kūṟṟam, (after the daily midday offerings), by Kaṟṟaḷi-Baṭṭālakaṉ a member of the regiment Arumoḻidēva-teriñja Kaikkōḷar.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kopparakesaripaṉmaṟkku yāṇṭu 2 Āvatu miṟaikkūṟṟattu devatāṉam tiruppaḻaṉamuṭaiyār koyilile nicati nālavar brāhmaṇar
candrātitaval Uṇṇa Ivvūr tevatāṉam peraṅkālakkuṭi Eliyūtu puṉcey tiṭal Ivāti caṇḍeśvarariṭaiyum patipātamulattāriṭaiyum U
ṭaiyār Arumoḻitevateriñca kaikoḷaril kaṟṟaḷi paṭṭālakaṉ vilaikoṇṭu mayakkiṉa nilattukku kiḻpārkkellai peṟṟāṉmayakkalukkum naṅ
kāriymayakkalukku meṟkku teṉpārkkellai naṅkārimayakkalukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai mātevimayakkalukku pāyñca Uḷciṟuvāykkālukku kiḻa
kku kiḻpārkke ttiṭalkkā kālukku meṟkkum teṉpār vuṭ ciṟuvāykkālu
kku vaṭakkum melpāṟkke kkum vaṭapārkkellai cāttimayakkalu Ivvicaitta pe
runāṉkellai ṉum Ivaṉukke viṟṟukkuṭutta nilattukku kiḻ pārkkel
lai mūṉ lai Oru māvaraikku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai Uḷ ciṟuvāykkā
lukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai nā
ṟṟukālukku teṟkkum Ivvicaitta
perunāṉkellaiyuḷ Akappaṭṭa nila
mum Ituvallatu Iṉṉum Ivaṉukke viṟṟukkuṭut
ta nilam kiḻppārkkellai kiḻāṉ kāṇikka
ykkum meṟkum teṉpārkkellai paḻaṅ ceyk
ku vaṭakku melpārkkellai toṭi muṉṟumāvukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai Oru māvaraik kum tiṭa
lukkum tiruvaṭimayakkalukkum teṟkkum Ivvicaitta perunāṉkellaiyuḷ ḷakappaṭṭa nila
mum Ituvallatu Iṉṉum Ivaṉukkey maṇṇilaiyāka
viṟṟukkuṭutta puṉcey tiṭal Iraṇṭu māvum IStops here. The following lines engraved separately may be the continuation of the above: 1 kkāle iraṇṭumā mukkāṇiyum [mikuticu]rukkam uḷḷaṭaṅka uṇṇilam 2 —tu vallatu ivaṉu[k*]ke maṇṇilaiyāka viṟṟukuṭutta vāykkā- 3 liṉ kiḻkaraik kāṇiyum taṭipalavāy vanta nilam mu- 4 •••••• paṭṭa iṟaiyuma••••tita•••• 5 •••••• pātamulattomum itu paṉmāheśvararakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 19.29 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
